title: Light Warming Russian Eggs Bake
description: A buttery, light, and festive Russian dish featuring Jamaican curry powder, perfect for breakfast or brunch. It's an egg-free-friendly option that's easy to make and pleasing to the senses.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180 degrees Celsius (350 degrees Fahrenheit).
Butter a 20x20 cm baking dish and set aside.
Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat, then add curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour and milk until smooth, then add grated cheese, sour cream, salt, and black pepper. Stir until combined.
Add cooked mushrooms, chopped dill, diced bell peppers, and grated zucchini to the saucepan with curry powder and butter. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until vegetables are slightly tender.
Transfer the saucepan mixture to the prepared baking dish and pour the flour-milk-cheese mixture over it.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the eggs bake are set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Sprinkle with additional grated cheese, if desired.
Serve warm, garnished with additional fresh dill, if desired.
Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
